title: Memento Mori - Prologue
content:
The moment you turn 25 years old, you die. Everyone knows that. The way you'll die is something you only find out then. For some people it's a heart attack. Others end up victim of some kind of accident. Occasionally you hear about people being struck by lightning. Everyone knows that too.

No one knows why it happens though.

Scientists concluded that it was some kind of sporadic development. The devout preach that it's a sign of divine intervention or punishment. But that was a long time ago. To most people it's just life.

It's not that uncommon to hear a death hack get popular out of nowhere, like how eating only yellow foods for a week or sleeping for most of the day will let you live longer. None of them actually do anything though.

You die the moment you turn 25, so the "why" doesn't matter all that much.
